dataflowSinks.name: UserQueryAdditionalSalesData1
dataflowSinks.script:
sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		TransactionID as string,
		CustomerID as string,
		ProductID as string,
		SalesAmount as string,
		TransactionDate as string
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> UserQueryAdditionalSalesData1
